scripts.build: pnpm --filter @audit/db db:generate && pnpm --filter @audit/db build && pnpm --filter @audit/pipeline build && pnpm --filter @audit/llm build && pnpm --filter @audit/plugins build && pnpm --filter @audit/ui build && pnpm --filter @audit/web build
scripts.build:worker: pnpm --filter @audit/db db:generate && pnpm --filter @audit/db build && pnpm --filter @audit/pipeline build && pnpm --filter @audit/llm build && pnpm --filter @audit/plugins build && pnpm --filter @audit/worker build && pnpm --filter @audit/plugins exec playwright install chromium
